cases.description: Valid allow receipt with matching signature and parameter hash.
Valid deny receipt with matching signature and parameter hash.
Receipt is signed correctly but carries a bad action parameter hash.
Receipt payload was modified after signing, so signature verification fails.
Valid cancelled receipt: operator-initiated interruption with a reason.
Valid incomplete receipt: tool did not reach a terminal state in time.

decision.reason: tool returned no terminal result before deadline

cases.description: Allow receipt that embeds a transparency-log inclusion-proof in metadata.
Allow receipt issued under policy-bindings-v2 (different policy generation).
Allow receipt whose policy_hash is a SHA-256 hex digest rather than a symbolic id.
Allow receipt with sizeable nested metadata (lists plus an object with many keys).

metadata.notes: Large metadata exercising deeper nesting and longer key/value pairs across the canonical-JSON encoder.

cases.description: Valid allow receipt with an empty evidence array (omitted from canonical JSON).
Valid allow receipt with no metadata field (omitted from canonical JSON).
First of two receipts in a multi-step stream, linked through metadata.stream.
Second of two receipts in a multi-step stream, references the previous receipt id.
Allow receipt issued by an in-process kernel (trust_level = verified).
Allow receipt issued in shadow/observability mode (trust_level = advisory).
Allow receipt issued under a multi-tenant deployment (tenant_id present).
Allow receipt signed by the rotated kernel key (different signing seed; embedded kernel_key matches signer).
Receipt was signed by the rotated kernel key but its embedded kernel_key was replaced with the primary key, so signature verification fails.
Deny receipt with a longer human-readable reason string (signature-block boundary stress).

decision.reason: blocked by ForbiddenPathGuard: target path is on the deny-list and matches the protected-system-files prefix; no override capability was presented within the request envelope
